features.name: event control with iff qualifier
features.description: Code should include an always block with an event control that uses the iff qualifier to conditionally guard the event

features.name: assertion property with iff guarded clock
features.description: Code should include an assert property statement with an iff-qualified clock event control
features.snippet: assert property (@(posedge clk iff enable) disable iff (reset) (expr));
